title: Elaphoglossum hymenodiastrum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum hymenodiastrum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Elaphoglossum and is a member of the Osmundales order. The species is further classified as a member of the subclass Polypodiidae. Elaphoglossum hymenodiastrum is native to Central and South America. This species is epiphytic in nature, growing on trees and other vegetation.
